title: Yes, Please - Video Walk Through
excerpt: Just so you don't feel left out, Paper Clipping Roundtable came by the booth and in the midst of an allergy attack (no sneezes on camera though) I showed them the new collection.
body: Just so you don't feel left out, Paper Clipping Roundtable came by the booth and in the midst of an allergy attack (no sneezes on camera though) I showed them the new collection.
